## Problem Statement
What user/business problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the expected behavior and UX/API changes.

## Alternatives Considered
Other options you evaluated.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Risks
Security, performance, migration, or product risks.

## Rollout Plan
How this should be launched safely.
